description: Deed of release. Location: Cairo (where Avraham b. Natan was judge). Date not preserved. Yefet b. Marwān releases the clothier (al-bazzāz) Abū l-Faḍl Yosef b. Avraham ha-Levi from all obligations. Signed by Araḥ b. Shelomo, Merayhot b. Meshullam and Elʿazar b. Menaḥem. The document is written by by Avraham b. Natan Av Bet Din, who signs the validation (qiyyum) together with Avraham b. Shabbetay, Elʿazar b. Yosef ha-Levi and Yosef b. Avraham ha-Levi. On verso there are rhymed wishes including citations from Psalms 115:12 and Malachi 3:16. (Information from CUDL and Goitein's index card.)
description_he: שטר שחרור. מיקום: קהיר; יפת בן מרואן משחרר את אבו אל-פד'ל יוסף בן אברהם הלוי מכל חיוביו; חתמו מספר עדים
